description_long: This humanoid robot features an exposed mechanical structure with visible wiring, metal framework, and articulated joints. Its head is equipped with two large, circular components resembling eyes, and a complex arrangement of wires and metallic parts forms the facial area. The arms and legs are constructed from segmented metal rods and joints, allowing for a wide range of motion, and the hands and feet are detailed with multiple articulated digits. The robot's torso is compact, with numerous cables and mechanical elements running along its length, giving it an industrial, unfinished appearance. The overall design is skeletal and utilitarian, emphasizing function over aesthetics, with no external panels or coverings. The robot's construction suggests durability and flexibility, suitable for urban environments where adaptability is key.
description: A skeletal humanoid robot with exposed metal framework, visible wiring, and articulated limbs, featuring large circular eye-like components and detailed mechanical joints.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's symmetrical structure, large circular eyes, exposed wiring, and articulated hands and feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin profile, protruding facial components, and the layered arrangement of wires and joints along the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, additional wiring, and the mechanical complexity of the spine and limb connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the same thin profile, with visible wiring and joint articulation along the arms and legs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides and legs straight, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; only exposed mechanical components, wiring, and metal framework are visible.
attribute_facial_features: Face consists of two large circular eye-like components, a complex arrangement of wires, and no discernible mouth or nose; lacks expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints, with articulated fingers and toes; limbs appear highly flexible and capable of a wide range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two large circular components on the head likely function as visual sensors; no other sensors are visibly apparent.
